title: Trying to run mpi job in pod
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

What I am trying to achieve is, having multiple mpi jobs on one host. What works so far is to start one job with the flags `--pid=host --net=host --ipc=host --userns=keep-id`

To seperate the two jobs it would be nice to have seperated namespaces between the jobs. So I thought this would be a great usecase for a pod. 

Since pods share the net and the ipc I created a pod like this:
`podman pod create --share=pid --name dyna-00`

And then tried to create containers in this pod using mpirun. 
But unfortunatly this fails with the following error:

crun:
```
Error: cannot setns `/proc/47477/ns/pid`: Operation not permitted
write to sync socket: Broken pipe: OCI runtime permission denied error
```

runc:
```
Error: container_linux.go:345: starting container process caused "process_linux.go:430: container init caused \"rootfs_linux.go:58: mounting \\\"proc\\\" to rootfs \\\"/chome/poduser/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/3c2065ca89c1efa71279086b3e45c7ffffe4a9e1e332f4e6f54e8d097f5593fb/merged\\\" at \\\"/proc\\\" caused \\\"operation not permitted\\\"\"": OCI runtime permission denied error
MPI Application rank 3 exited before MPI_Init() with status 126
mpirun: Broken pipe
```


**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. `podman pod create --share=pid --name test`

2. `mpirun -hostfile hostfile podman run --runtime /usr/bin/crun --rm --env-host --userns=keep-id -d --pod test localhost/ls-dyna sleep 600`

**Describe the results you received:**

crun:
```
Error: cannot setns `/proc/47477/ns/pid`: Operation not permitted
write to sync socket: Broken pipe: OCI runtime permission denied error
```

runc:
```
Error: container_linux.go:345: starting container process caused "process_linux.go:430: container init caused \"rootfs_linux.go:58: mounting \\\"proc\\\" to rootfs \\\"/chome/poduser/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/3c2065ca89c1efa71279086b3e45c7ffffe4a9e1e332f4e6f54e8d097f5593fb/merged\\\" at \\\"/proc\\\" caused \\\"operation not permitted\\\"\"": OCI runtime permission denied error
MPI Application rank 3 exited before MPI_Init() with status 126
mpirun: Broken pipe
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

Creation of 24 containers that sleep for 600 seconds

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

When looking at the pod after the error happens, there are ~5 containers associated to the pod. But they are in status created and are not running

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:            1.6.4
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.12.12
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**


comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Sorry @firefly-serenity This seems to have been lost i the noice.
@adrianreber @giuseppe PTAL

both crun and runc fail for the reason that we are trying to join a PID namespace and at the same time create a new user namespace.  The new user namespace doesn't own the PID namespace, so it cannot mount `/proc`.  We can't even workaround it from Podman as we cannot bind mount PID from the host.

We need to support `--userns keep-id` at the POD level so that it is not necessary to specify it for the container.

I will play with it and see if I can do anything from crun to handle this case.

I am still trying to figure out a way to address it in the OCI runtime.

I am going to close it as a dup of https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/6153
